Title: AlchemyCMS: Unauthenticated nested page API leaks restricted & unpublished content
Description:
The unauthenticated `GET /api/pages/nested` endpoint returns the full page tree to any anonymous caller, including restricted (member-only) pages and unpublished/draft pages that should be hidden.
Appending `?elements=true` additionally dumps the element/ingredient **content** of restricted pages, fully bypassing the access control the sibling `show` and `index` actions enforce.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 7.4.15, all versions starting from 8.0.0-a before 8.0.15, all versions starting from 8.1.0 before 8.1.14, all versions starting from 8.2.0 before 8.2.6
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 7.4.15 before 8.0.0-a, all versions starting from 8.0.15 before 8.1.0, all versions starting from 8.1.14 before 8.2.0, all versions starting from 8.2.6
